title: Membership of the offensive weapons homicide review oversight board
body: "The Home Secretary has approved these appointments to the offensive weapons homicide review board.  The oversight board has been established to monitor and oversee the local implementation of the reviews, to consider whether lessons learned are being acted upon, and to draw together thematic learning at a national level.  The oversight board is a non-statutory committee which will be composed of experts in safeguarding, preventing homicide and serious violence and public protection. "
